errors.sentence: Everyone in my group already finished their parts and I haven't even started. They're waiting on me.
The deadline is in 4 hours and I have way too much left to do. My heart is pounding.
Everyone seems to know what they're doing except me. I feel like a fraud who somehow got into this program.
I know I should be worried about this deadline but honestly I just don't care anymore. I've given up.
My to-do list has 30 items and every single one makes me feel exhausted just looking at it.
I have three urgent things due and I can't decide which one to do first so I'm doing none of them.
The semester is ending and I have incomplete grades in four classes. I don't know how to fix this.
